ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $User.ProfileId =='00e30000001y7c3', $User.Id =='0053A00000BRbvV' ), RecordType.Name == 'PKI SPI Sales Process', ISPICKVAL(Risk_Upside__c, 'Risk'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Severity_of_Risk__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Mitigation_Owner__c,'') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_042: Severity of Risk & Risk Mitigation Owner are mandatory when Risk is selected for Risk/Upside field
